testcase.name: test_main_admin_can_create_staff_account
testcase.failure:
Tests\Feature\AdminScopeAuthorizationTest::test_main_admin_can_create_staff_account Failed asserting that a row in the table [users] matches the attributes { "email": "new.staff@gmail.com", "role": "staff", "branch_id": 2, "admin_scope": null }.
Found similar results: [ { "email": "new.staff@gmail.com", "role": "staff", "branch_id": 1, "admin_scope": null } ].

testcase.name: test_admin_management_features_work
testcase.failure:
